VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title "Biotalk: Enzyme function prediction with natural language supervision" was not found in any web search results, academic database, or dedicated paper page. The arXiv ID 2404.02285 points to an entirely different paper ("LP++: A Surprisingly Strong Linear Probe for Few-Shot CLIP"), and the cited authors do not match any identified paper on this topic. A related project called "BioTalk" exists (a dataset for multimodal enzymatic function prediction), but it has a different title and different authors, indicating a likely hallucinated or fabricated reference.
LINK: NONE
